character_sheet_rules: sheet_prompt MUST be English (for image models)
Left 50% of frame: ultra-large facial close-up only
Right 50%: front/back/side full body; black censor boxes on faces
negative_prompt must be empty string (no negative prompts)
image_refs may be empty; swappable anytime
Provide sheet_prompt_zh_summary for human reading (Chinese aid)
prop_and_set_rules: Props/sets use multi-view product or location sheets (not face censor layout)
Still photoreal, consistent scale, obey style_pack
